sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    center = (sum(rows)/len(rows), sum(cols)/len(cols))
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'c', 'G', 'b', 'g']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, center={center}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
